texto: A Gnani [the enlightened one] does not have to turn beads of a rosary
autor: He turns the beads of own’s own Self (the Soul).
explicacao: Orientação direta de He turns the beads of own’s own Self (the Soul). sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “A Gnani [the enlightened one] does not have to turn beads of a rosary” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, dada-bhagwan, gnani, útil em momentos de reflexao.
